prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海综合组最低位次分别约为4406名、4276名、4096名、6458名、4096名。2021–2023年位次逐年小幅前移（4406→4096），2024年因选科要求从"物 理必选"调整为"物理、化学(2科必选)"，位次大幅后移至6458名；2025年迅速恢复至4096名，与2023年持平，表明该校在沪报考热度稳固。2025年基准位次约4096名；该校在上海市招生计划2021–2023年均为28人，2024年增至29人，2025年增至32人，2026年（招生计划文件）进一步扩至34人，连续三年扩招，累计扩招21.4%。扩招使竞争 略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京邮电大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第54位→2022年第62位→2023年第57位→2024年第63位→2025年第60 位→2026年第50位，排名近年稳步提升，2026年首次进入前50，学校综合实力和认可度持续增强；该校在声誉监测文件中未出现负面事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度 排名第64位，评价"一般"，综合热度约47.9万，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，无明显舆情波动；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号，报考心理稳定；信息与 通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、软件工程A-、网络空间安全A-、光学工程A-，共6个A类学科，在信息通信领域具有突出优势，与招生专业高 度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业热度持续高热（2024年电子信息/通信热指数76.86，计算机类67.80），均为社会高度推荐方向；人工智能专业 热度谨慎观望但整体偏正向。上海市2026年普通高考总人数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；北京邮电大学位于北京市，对上海市考生具有较强地域吸引力。
8 .【预测结论】综合历年位次在2024年选科调整后迅速恢复的稳固态势、2026年招生计划继续小幅扩招（+2人/+6.25%）、软科排名首次进入前50的层次提升、以及上海市考生总数 大幅增加约35%带来的竞争加剧，考虑考生规模激增和学校排名上升的正面效应，预测2026年最低位次约4100名，区间3600–4600名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（元班）（未来学院"元班"实验班。含计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、具身智能专业）
- 电子信息类（元班）（未来学院"元班"实验班。含通信工程、电子科学与技术、低空技术与工程专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、网络工程、数据科学与大数据技术专业）
- 电子信息类（含电子科学与技术、电子信息科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统专业）
- 通信工程（大类招生）（含通信工程、电子信息工程、空间信息与数字技术专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 人工智能（大类招生）（含信息工程、人工智能专业）
- 软件工程
- 自动化类（智能机器人）（含自动化、机器人工程、机械工程（数字智能）专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3600–4600名内，建议以二档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、通信工程）为主攻方向，一档元班专业（计算机类元班、电子信息类元班）作为冲刺目标，三档专业 （人工智能、软件工程、自动化类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（3600名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（4600名左右）建议以三档专业为主确保 录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Shanghai comprehensive group were approximately 4406, 4276, 4096, 6458, and 4096 respectively. Rankings moved slightly forward year by year from 2021 to 2023 (4406→4096). In 2024, due to the adjustment of subject requirements from "Physics required" to "Physics and Chemistry (both required)", the ranking significantly dropped to 6458. In 2025, it quickly recovered to 4096, the same as in 2023, indicating stable application popularity in Shanghai. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4096. The enrollment plan in Shanghai was 28 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 29 in 2024, 32 in 2025, and further expanded to 34 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), with three consecutive years of expansion totaling a 21.4% increase. The expansion slightly eases competition, but the effect is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings were 54th in 2021, 62nd in 2022, 57th in 2023, 63rd in 2024, 60th in 2025, and 50th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, entering the top 50 for the first time in 2026, with continuously enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. No negative events were found in reputation monitoring documents, indicating stable reputation. Douyin popularity ranks 64th, rated as "average", with comprehensive popularity of about 479,000, short video exposure at a medium level, and no significant public opinion fluctuations. No historical abnormal admission records were found for this university, indicating stable application psychology. It has 6 A-level disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Software Engineering A-, Cyberspace Security A-, and Optical Engineering A-, with outstanding advantages in the field of information and communication, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Computer and electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly popular (2024 electronic information/communication heat index 76.86, computer class 67.80), both highly recommended by society. The artificial intelligence major is cautiously observed but overall positive. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates, intensifying competition. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Shanghai candidates.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the stable recovery of historical rankings after the 2024 subject adjustment, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2 people/+6.25%), the improvement in Soft Science rankings entering the top 50 for the first time, and the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of Shanghai candidates intensifying competition, considering the positive effects of the surge in candidate numbers and the rise in university ranking, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 4100, with a range of 3600–4600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Class (Yuan Class) (Future College "Yuan Class" Experimental Class. Includes Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Embodied Intelligence majors)
- Electronic Information Class (Yuan Class) (Future College "Yuan Class" Experimental Class. Includes Communication Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Class (Includes Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology majors)
- Electronic Information Class (Includes Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System majors)
- Communication Engineering (Major Enrollment) (Includes Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Spatial Information and Digital Technology majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Major Enrollment) (Includes Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence majors)
- Software Engineering
- Automation Class (Intelligent Robot) (Includes Automation, Robot Engineering, Mechanical Engineering (Digital Intelligence) majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3600–4600, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Communication Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 Yuan Class majors (Computer Class Yuan Class, Electronic Information Class Yuan Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Automation Class) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 3600), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (around 4600), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

_translation.university_name_en: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications
